stickers_header: THOLA IZITIKA ZAKHO ZAMAHHALA ZE-'BITCOIN ACCEPTED HERE'
stickers_request_details: Mazise amakhasimende akho ukuthi uyamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ngalezi zitika zamahhala ze-'Bitcoin Accepted Here'.
stickers_request_instructions: Uzothola izitika ezintathu ze-'Bitcoin Accepted Here' ngemvilophu emhlophe. Uma udinga izitika ezingaphezu kwezintathu zebhizinisi lakho, khululeka ucele izikhathi eziningi. Idatha yekheli iyasuswa ngemuva kokuthumela izitika zakho zamahhala.
stickers_print_details: Ungaphrinta izitika zakho ze-'Bitcoin Accepted Here', noma ngabe uhlala kuphi! Chofoza olimini lwakho ngezansi ukuze ubuke amafayela ezitika kanye nemiyalelo.
stickers_request_language: Awuliboni ulimi lwakho? Gcwalisa ifomu ngezansi ukuze ucele amafayela ezitika ze-'Bitcoin Accepted Here' ngolimi lwakho lwendawo.
